list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant
list.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM observex.logs ORDER BY tenant_id

list.name: service
list.label: Service
list.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM observex.logs WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND service_name != '' ORDER BY service_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS t, severity, count() AS n FROM observex.logs WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND (service_name IN (${service:sqlstring}) OR has(array(${service:sqlstring}), '__all__')) AND (severity IN (${severity:sqlstring}) OR has(array(${severity:sqlstring}), '$$__all')) AND ('${search}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(body, '${search}') > 0) AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime GROUP BY t, severity ORDER BY t

SELECT timestamp, severity, service_name, body, trace_id, span_id, attributes FROM observex.logs WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND (service_name IN (${service:sqlstring}) OR has(array(${service:sqlstring}), '__all__')) AND (severity IN (${severity:sqlstring}) OR has(array(${severity:sqlstring}), '$$__all')) AND ('${search}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(body, '${search}') > 0) AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 500
